name: macOS Model Detail Panel
description: Tests the model detail panel in the center column. Verifies that clicking a sidebar model shows the detail panel with model name, status, capabilities, stats grid, and load/unload button. Requires at least one model on device.
prerequisites: At least one model file in the Documents directory

steps.description: Verify sidebar list exists with at least one model.
Verify the detail column root exists.
Verify the community browser is shown by default (no model selected).
Verify the model detail panel root exists.
After clicking a model, verify the model detail shows name and status.
Verify the Load Model button is visible (model not currently loaded).
